top_entities.name: Sudan
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 22): International bodies warn El Obeid could become another El Fasher. RSF drone strikes continue; power offline; hospitals non-functional. UN Security Council demanded halt Jun 20. 500,000 at imminent atrocity risk.

top_entities.name: South Sudan
top_entities.news_summary: RENEWED CIVIL WAR: Kiir abandoned 2018 peace deal. 471,000 new IDPs; 100,000 fled to Ethiopia after Akobo capture. Jonglei aerial bombardments. Last assessed Jun 4 — situation escalated significantly.

top_entities.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
top_entities.news_summary: DUAL CRITICAL: Ebola 837+ cases/196 deaths; 70+ medics infected Jun 19; no vaccine. Rwanda/M23 forced recruitment including children; detention camp atrocities (HRW Jun 10).

top_entities.name: Venezuela
top_entities.news_summary: MAJOR STATUS CHANGE: Maduro captured Jan 3, 2026. Acting President Rodriguez. 659 political prisoners released. But 400+ remain. Jun 12: US airstrike killed Tren de Aragua leader in Venezuela. Score 4.4 was pre-removal — reassessment required.

top_entities.name: OpenAI
top_entities.news_summary: MAJOR LEGAL ACTION (Jun 12-13): 42-state AG coalition subpoena 5 days after IPO filing ($852B). Florida AG suit and criminal investigation re ChatGPT/FSU mass shooting. EU AI Act Aug 2 enforcement in 41 days.

top_entities.name: xAI/Grok
top_entities.news_summary: THREE LEGAL ACTIONS (Jun 8-22): Devin Kim whistleblower lawsuit Jun 9 (fired for Grok safety concerns); Canadian Privacy Commissioner violation ruling; UK MP deepfake suit Jun 3. First-ever AI safety whistleblower retaliation lawsuit.

top_entities.name: Israel
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: Six countries imposed sanctions on settler networks Jun 9. Amnesty Jun 10: ethnic cleansing is state policy. 950+ settler incidents. 992+ Palestinians killed in ceasefire violations.

top_entities.name: Iran
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: 125th week hunger strikes in 56 prisons. 784+ executions YTD. Peyman Ganji moved to execution facility. 78 protesters at imminent execution risk.

top_entities.name: Ukraine
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: Poltava/Kharkiv strikes Jun 20-21. UN: 62,716 civilian casualties. June 2026 highest civilian fatality month in 3 years.

top_entities.name: Afghanistan
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: Taliban shot protesters in Herat Jun 9; child killed. UN Security Council resolution adopted. HRW Jun 11: crimes against humanity.

top_entities.name: Bolivia
top_entities.news_summary: PARTIALLY RESOLVING (Jun 22): Blockades fell 103 to 28 after state of emergency Jun 20. Death toll 17. Air Force Cessna crashed killing 6. Underlying political crisis unresolved.

top_entities.name: Rwanda
top_entities.news_summary: HRW DOCUMENTATION: Systematic M23 forced recruitment including children; detention camp atrocities. 2,100+ killed since Jun 2025 peace deal. Composite 41.8 — 1.8 above developing boundary.

top_entities.name: Nigeria
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL: 52.8M at food insecurity in Sahel lean season peak. Borno: 15,000 at IPC Phase 5 (worst in decade). WFP $174.7M required through July.

top_entities.name: Humana
top_entities.news_summary: POST-DOWNGRADE WATCH: Downgraded to 35.2 on Jun 21. Barrows v. Humana class action active. DOJ FCA complaint: kickbacks/discrimination. CVS/Aetna $117.7M settlement Jun 11 signals comparable exposure.

top_entities.name: Apple
top_entities.news_summary: NLRB ULP WATCH (3rd cycle): Towson closed Jun 20. IAM ULP charge active. 40+ Congress members sent Cook letter Jun 2. Faster Labor Contracts Act passed House Jun 9. I3 watch continues.

sector_alerts.title: Sudan El Obeid — international bodies warn could become another El Fasher; RSF drone pressure continues Jun 22
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 22: International bodies warn El Obeid could replicate El Fasher massacre (6,000 killed in 3 days). RSF drone strikes continue; power offline; hospitals non-functional. UN Security Council demanded halt Jun 20. 500,000 civilians at imminent atrocity risk.

sector_alerts.title: Bolivia — blockades partially clearing after state of emergency; Air Force Cessna crash kills 6 on relief mission Jun 22
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 22: Active blockades fell 103 to 28. Death toll 17. Air Force Cessna FAB-409 crashed killing 4 civilians plus 2 crew during emergency mission. Santa Cruz agreement; Tupac Katari temporary pause.

sector_alerts.title: Venezuela — Maduro removed Jan 2026; transition uncertain; 400+ political prisoners remain
sector_alerts.summary: Jan 3, 2026: Maduro captured. Acting President Rodriguez. 659 political prisoners released Jan-Mar. But 400+ remain; authoritarian structures intact. Jun 12: US airstrike killed Tren de Aragua leader in Venezuela. Score 4.4 was pre-removal — reassessment warranted.

sector_alerts.title: OpenAI — 42-state AG subpoena Jun 12-13; Florida criminal investigation re FSU shooting
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 12-13: Coalition of 42 state AGs issued sweeping subpoena 5 days after IPO filing ($852B). Targets: ads, user data, minors, sycophancy, safety. Florida AG suit plus criminal investigation re ChatGPT/Apr 2025 FSU mass shooting (22 killed).

sector_alerts.title: South Sudan — renewed civil war Feb 2025; Kiir abandoned peace deal; 471,000 new IDPs
sector_alerts.summary: Feb-Jun 2026: Kiir abandoned 2018 peace deal. 471,000 new IDPs; 199,000 refugees. Jonglei aerial bombardments. Health facilities bombed. Humanitarian access severely limited.

sector_alerts.title: DRC Ebola — 70+ medics infected Jun 19; 837 cases/196 deaths; M23 conflict obstructing response
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 19: 70+ medics infected. 837 confirmed cases/196 deaths. Uganda: 19 cases. PHEIC since May 16. No vaccine (9 months away). M23 conflict obstructs contact tracing (45% vs 90% needed).

sector_alerts.title: EU AI Act — Aug 2, 2026 enforcement powers activate in 41 days; all frontier labs with EU presence face compliance
sector_alerts.summary: Aug 2, 2026 is 41 days away. Commission enforcement powers for GPAI model obligations enter application. Annex III high-risk deferred to Dec 2027 (Digital Omnibus). Article 50 transparency obligations remain on Aug 2 schedule. Fines up to 35M EUR or 7% global turnover.

sector_alerts.title: Israel West Bank — six countries impose sanctions Jun 9; Amnesty: ethnic cleansing state policy Jun 10
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 9: UK/Australia/Canada/France/NZ/Norway imposed coordinated sanctions on settler violence networks. Jun 10: Amnesty — ethnic cleansing is deliberate Israeli government strategy. UN: 950+ incidents across 230 communities.

sector_alerts.title: US reproductive rights — Guttmacher midyear Jun 3; ballot measures in Missouri/Nevada; 41 states with restrictions
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 3 Guttmacher midyear: 41 states have bans/restrictions. 13 total bans. Ballot measures: Missouri (repeal), Nevada (protection). Hawaii/Oregon enacted shield laws.

sector_alerts.title: Faster Labor Contracts Act — passed US House Jun 9; affects Starbucks, Apple, and Fortune 500 labor landscape
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 9: US House passed Faster Labor Contracts Act requiring expedited first-contract bargaining. Directly affects Starbucks (4+ years, no contract) and Apple (NLRB ULP active). Bill moves to Senate.
